Values.name: Purchase Price
Values.description: The price paid to acquire inventory (cost price)

Values.name: Landed Cost
Values.description: Total cost including shipping, duties, and taxes

Values.name: Wholesale Price
Values.description: The price offered to bulk buyers or resellers

Values.name: Retail Price
Values.description: The standard selling price for customers

Values.name: Sale Price
Values.description: Discounted price during a sale or promotion

Values.name: Clearance Price
Values.description: Discounted price for clearing old stock

Values.name: Contract Price
Values.description: Special pricing for negotiated deals (B2B customers)

Values.name: Subscription Price
Values.description: Price for products sold on a subscription basis

Values.name: Custom Price
Values.description: Price overrides used for special transactions

Values.name: Cost+ Pricing
Values.description: Cost-based pricing with a dynamic markup

Values.name: Deleted
Values.description: The underlying item has been removed. The associated Part will be in the description.
